series_metadata.series_description: The Auxiliary Services Program is authorized under 3317.06 and 3317.024 of the Ohio Revised Code. Payments are made on a per pupil basis to the public school district where the non-public school is located. The public school district, upon requests from the non-public school, provides 1) textbooks, 2) diagnostic, therapeutic, and remedial personnel services, and 3) educational equipment to the non-public school students. This includes forms SF-230 and SF-200.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Five years, provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Five years, provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
